meta.title: Vila Nova Apartment | Atlas Architecture
meta.description: A complete renovation of a high-floor apartment in Vila Nova Conceição, maximizing natural light and framing city views through floor-to-ceiling glass.

data.name: Vila Nova Apartment
data.description: A complete renovation of a high-floor apartment in Vila Nova Conceição. The design maximizes natural light and frames panoramic views of the city through floor-to-ceiling glass, while a restrained material palette keeps the focus on the landscape beyond.

image.alt: High-end apartment in Vila Nova Conceição

data.headline: Have a project in mind?
data.text: Let's talk about your vision and how we can bring it to life.
